---
id: drop-table-from-data-space
title: "Drop table from data space"
description: "Drop the specified table from a data space. The datasource must belong to the authenticated user."
sidebar_label: "Drop table from data space"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/openapi/datadata-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Drop table from data space"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/data-spaces/{datasourceId}/drop-table"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Drop the specified table from a data space. The datasource must belong to the authenticated user.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
